reviews.review_description:
This isn't really a dark ride, but the description is spot-on. It's a  calm scavenger hunt in a single room, with a story to go with it.
There is no pressure (unlike a typical timed escape room), no complex puzzles to worry about solving. Exploring the room is intuitive. It took me longer than I thought it would (30-60 minutes maybe?), but not long enough to be frustrating.
If you are looking for a long experience with complex puzzles, this is not it... but for what it is, I really enjoyed it.

Quirky story, fun characters, and a beautifully executed cartoony art style — Dark Ride: The Feline Fix is a delight from the start. The clean graphics and unique atmosphere make exploring this magical world genuinely enjoyable.

I’m still searching for the final ingredient for my potion, and I can’t wait to see how the story continues. The mystery of whether I can turn the cats back into humans keeps me fully engaged.

A whimsical, fairy-tale experience that stands out — definitely worth checking out!
A short, beautifully crafted experience that will delight the most magical members of the family! Great for entertaining nephews and nieces!
